title: helenium amphibolum
intro: Helenium amphibolum, also known as Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Helenium amphibolum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, which include reducing congestion, soothing sore throats, and promoting overall well-being.
